meaning: adj.非社会的,不合群的,不善交际的
examples: I work long and unsocial hours.
She is more shy than unsocial.
Personal disorganization resulting in unsocial behavior.
Wages include a 9% element for working unsocial hours, though less than 60% of policemen actually work them.
Overtime and unsocial hours payments will also be cut to time-plus-30% while work on negotiations on new work rotas and other changes by September 2011 is to continue.
